results.title: Wilaya - Wikipedia
results.snippet: A wilaya or wilayah (Arabic: وِلَايَة, romanized: wilāya, plural وِلَايَات wilāyāt; [1] Classical Persian: ولایت wilāyat; Urdu: ولایت vilāyat; Turkish: vilayet) is an administrative division, usually translated as "state", …

results.title: Mikoa ya Rwanda - Wikipedia, kamusi elezo huru
results.snippet: Mikoa ya Rwanda (kwa Kinyarwanda: intara) imegawanyika katika wilaya wilaya (akarere) na manispaa (umujyi). Kabla ya Januari 1, 2006, Rwanda ilikuwa na jumla ya mikoa.
